item.title: 以下因素可能促使全球央行采取支持经济增长的措施
item.description: 经济学家们正在权衡通胀冲击的风险与油价飙升对经济增长造成的冲击【原文：Economists are weighing the risks of an inflation shock against the blow to growth from surging oil prices】

item.title: 风投机构在热门人工智能初创企业中满足于持有较小股份
item.description: 激烈的竞争使得赢得心仪的市场份额变得更加困难。【原文：Intense competition makes it harder to win the desired slice of the pie】

item.title: 经济学家预测美联储2026年将两次降息，并对主席提名人选沃什表示担忧
item.description: 据彭博新闻社调查显示，经济学家将美联储下次降息预期时间从3月推迟至6月，但仍预计年底前将有两次25个基点的降息。【原文：Economists pushed back their expectation for the Federal Reserve’s next interest rate cut to June from March, but still see two quarter-point reductions by year-end, according to a survey by Bloomberg News.】

item.title: 印度公路管理局基础设施信托首次公开募股认购率达四倍
item.description: 拉杰玛格基础设施投资信托基金600亿卢比（约合6.49亿美元）的首次公开募股在最后申购日获得四倍认购，表明在近期市场波动中，投资者对收益导向型资产的需求依然强劲。【原文：Raajmarg Infra Investment Trust’s 60 billion rupees ($649 million) initial public offering was subscribed four times on the final day of bidding, signaling resilient demand for yield-focused assets amid recent market volatility.】

item.title: 随着伊朗战争持续，迪拜加密货币活动Token2049被迫推迟
item.description: 全球最大的加密货币会议之一Token2049宣布，原定下月在迪拜举办的活动将取消。此举源于阿联酋及其他中东国家持续遭受伊朗导弹袭击的局势。【原文：Token2049, one of crypto’s largest conferences globally, will no longer hold its Dubai event as planned next month, as the United Arab Emirates and other Middle Eastern countries face ongoing missile strikes from Iran.】

item.title: 随着战争加剧滞胀威胁，60-40投资组合已无济于事
item.description:
受通胀风险和经济增长放缓影响，股市和债市同步下跌。【原文：

Stocks and bonds are falling in tandem on risk of inflation, slowing growth.

】

item.title: 匈牙利福林表现落后于其他新兴市场货币，能源冲击加剧了匈牙利风险
item.description: 在伊朗战争期间，匈牙利福林是表现最差的新兴市场货币，因为能源价格的飙升加剧了该国经济面临的诸多现有风险，而下个月的选举即将举行。【原文：Hungary’s forint is the worst performing emerging-market currency during the Iran war, as a jump in energy prices amplifies an array of existing risks to its economy ahead of next month’s elections.】

item.title: 意大利湖畔足球俱乐部推出1000欧元门票搭配人工智能服务
item.description:
在亿万富翁老板的支持下，凭借先进的AI分析技术，意大利足球俱乐部科莫1907正迅速在意甲联赛中崭露头角，同时正转型为一个豪华旅游目的地。【原文：

Backed by billionaire owners and driven by advanced AI analytics, Italian football club Como 1907 is rapidly climbing Serie A while transforming into a luxury tourist destination.

】

item.title: 欧洲利率市场剧烈震荡，对冲基金成为焦点
item.description: 中东战争引发的欧洲利率市场剧烈波动，重新引发了关于对冲基金在加剧市场波动方面所扮演角色的讨论。【原文：A burst of volatility in European rates markets, unleashed by war in the Middle East, is reviving a discussion about the role hedge funds play in amplifying the swings.】

item.title: 泰国当局突击搜查曼谷商场，查获10万件假冒商品
item.description: 泰国当局在曼谷一家著名购物中心突击搜查时查获逾10万件假冒商品，价值近100万美元。此前美国贸易官员将该商场列为恶名市场，此次行动是打击知识产权侵权行为的举措之一。【原文：Thai authorities seized more than 100,000 counterfeit items valued at nearly $1 million in a raid at a famous Bangkok shopping mall, as part of steps to tackle intellectual property violations after US trade officials had flagged it as a notorious market.】

item.title: 印尼称，各种情景分析表明，3%的财政赤字水平难以维持
item.description: 随着中东局势紧张导致油价远超最初预测，印度尼西亚正面临一场艰巨的挑战，力图将预算赤字控制在国内生产总值的3%这一法定上限之内。【原文：Indonesia is facing an uphill battle to maintain the budget deficit legal limit of 3% of gross domestic product as Middle East tensions drive oil prices well beyond initial forecasts.】

item.title: 尼日利亚央行准备捍卫奈拉汇率，战争动摇市场
item.description: 鉴于中东危机导致投资者抛售风险较高的新兴市场资产，尼日利亚央行已制定应急措施，以防奈拉汇率承压时维持其稳定。【原文：Nigeria’s central bank has prepared contingency measures to stabilize the naira if it comes under pressure, as investors dump riskier emerging-market assets because of the crisis in the Middle East.】

item.title: 英国人通胀预期在石油危机前有所缓解
item.description: 英国央行一项调查显示，在战争爆发导致油价飙升之前，英国家庭普遍预期未来一年通胀率将放缓。【原文：UK households had been expecting inflation to slow over the coming year, according to a Bank of England survey that was conducted before war erupted in the Middle East and sent oil prices soaring.】

item.title: 南非股市或将修正10%，跌势持续加深
item.description: 南非股市基准指数自2月下旬峰值以来已下跌10%，投资者纷纷撤离过热市场，而中东冲突仍在持续。【原文：South Africa’s stock benchmark has fallen 10% since peak in late February as investors pull away from overheated markets while conflict in the Middle East drags on.】

item.title: 香港对冲基金突袭押注重仓，未能通过高盛测试
item.description: 在成为香港自2017年以来最大规模金融业扫荡行动的对象之前，对冲基金公司Infini Capital Management Ltd.早已成为这座城市紧密相连的金融圈中的焦点人物。【原文：Before it was swept up in Hong Kong’s biggest financial-industry raids since 2017, hedge fund firm Infini Capital Management Ltd. was already a subject of intrigue in the city’s close-knit financial community.】

item.title: 英国计划改革核监管以加快项目推进
item.description: 英国政府表示将对核电行业进行全面改革，此前一项审查报告批评该行业过于规避风险，且更注重过程而非结果。【原文：The UK government said it would overhaul its nuclear power sector after a review criticized it for being too risk averse and favoring process over outcomes.】

item.title: 印度考虑为受伊朗战争影响的出口商提供疫情时期援助
item.description: 知情人士称，印度政府正讨论为出口商提供类似新冠疫情期间实施的支持措施，以帮助缓解伊朗战争引发的贸易中断造成的冲击。【原文：India’s government is discussing support measures for exporters similar to those implemented during the Covid pandemic to help soften the blow of trade disruptions triggered by the Iran war, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 战争威胁将阿联酋房地产债券狂欢戛然而止
item.description: 在伊朗战争重创债券市场并可能导致借贷狂潮戛然而止之际，那些曾争相向阿联酋房地产开发商提供贷款的投资者正承受着损失。【原文：Investors who rushed to lend money to real estate developers in the United Arab Emirates are nursing losses as the Iran war hammers their bonds and threatens to stall a borrowing binge.】

item.title: 韩国将动用超额税收收入应对油价冲击增支预算
item.description: 韩国财政部长表示，该国将动用额外税收收入编制补充预算，以缓解伊朗战争引发的油价飙升对家庭和企业造成的冲击。【原文：South Korea will use extra tax revenue to fund a supplementary budget to cushion households and businesses from surging oil prices triggered by the Iran war, the nation’s finance minister said.】

item.title: 中国信贷扩张超预期 尽管债券销售放缓
item.description: 中国信贷扩张在2月份意外地较去年同期有所加快，尽管政府债券销售放缓，但稳定的贷款发放起到了推动作用。【原文：China’s credit expansion surprisingly picked up from a year ago in February, helped by steady lending despite slower government bond sales.】

item.title: 新兴市场股市或将连续第二周下跌，油价持续坚挺
item.description: 随着中东冲突持续升级，布伦特原油价格维持在每桶100美元以上，新兴市场股票正面临连续第二周下跌。【原文：Emerging market stocks are headed for a second consecutive week of losses as Brent oil stays above $100 a barrel amid a deepening Middle East conflict.】

item.title: 滴滴全球扩张加速后再度陷入亏损
item.description: 滴滴出行上季度再度陷入亏损，这家中国网约车巨头在加大投资力度的同时，还面临着美团等海外新竞争对手的挑战。【原文：Didi Global Inc. fell back into the red last quarter after the Chinese ride-hailing leader stepped up investments while grappling with new rivals like Meituan abroad.】

item.title: 对年轻的纽约求职者而言，入门级职位正在消失
item.description: 凯拉·克鲁兹去年五月从东北大学毕业后，便开始在纽约地区求职。至今她仍在寻找工作。【原文：Kayla Cruz started hunting for jobs in the New York region after she graduated from Northeastern University last May. She’s still looking.】

item.title: Delivery Hero投资者Aspex要求CEO出售股份或离职
item.description: Delivery Hero SE的第二大股东Aspex Management正威胁称，若该公司不推进特定资产的出售计划，将试图更换这家外卖公司的管理层。【原文：Delivery Hero SE’s second-largest shareholder, Aspex Management, is threatening to try and replace the food delivery company’s management if it doesn’t push ahead with the sale of certain assets.】

item.title: 欧洲股市或将连续第二周下跌，伊朗战争阴云笼罩
item.description: 欧洲股市正走向连续第二周下跌，伊朗战争加剧了市场对通胀上升和经济增长放缓的担忧，而私人信贷问题的隐忧则潜伏在表面之下。【原文：European stocks were headed for a second week of losses as the war in Iran stokes fears about higher inflation and slower growth, while concerns over private credit bubbled beneath the surface.】

item.title: 中国批准首款脑植入装置投入商业应用
item.description: 中国首次批准了侵入式脑机接口产品，标志着中国初创企业在挑战埃隆·马斯克支持的Neuralink公司等美国竞争对手的尖端领域中，迈出了关键的监管里程碑。【原文：China has approved its first-ever invasive brain-computer interface product, marking a key regulatory milestone in Chinese startups’ quest to challenge US rivals such as Elon Musk-backed Neuralink Corp. in the cutting-edge field.】

item.title: 摩根大通将租用新鸿基地产位于西九龙的写字楼
item.description: 摩根大通公司将成为香港西九龙地区一处即将落成的写字楼项目的锚定租户，这标志着在商业地产市场持续低迷之际，香港达成了一笔规模最大的租赁交易之一。【原文：JPMorgan Chase & Co. will be the anchor tenant of an upcoming office project in Hong Kong’s West Kowloon area, marking one of the city’s largest leasing deals amid a prolonged downturn in the commercial market.】

item.title: 印度最大私人信贷借款人计划首次发行10亿美元债券
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度沙普尔吉·帕隆吉集团计划通过首次美元债券发行筹集最多10亿美元资金，用于再融资将于4月到期的本币债务。【原文：India’s Shapoorji Pallonji Group aims to raise up to $1 billion through its first dollar bond sale as it works to refinance local-currency debt maturing in April, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气未平仓合约量下滑，交易员应对市场动荡
item.description: 欧洲天然气期货未平仓合约量跌至五个月低点，交易员们正努力应对中东地区不可预测的消息流引发的剧烈价格波动，并纷纷平仓离场。【原文：Open interest in European natural gas futures dropped to a five-month low, with traders struggling to navigate intense price swings driven by unpredictable newsflow from the Middle East and closing their positions.】

item.title: 伊朗战争对中国"茶壶炼油厂"意味着什么
item.description:
中国可能失去一个关键的供应来源。

【原文：

China may lose a crucial source of supply.

】
